mnemonics: Activity = Android Component that handles user input and updates UI
Features = Multi-touch, GPS, Camera, Social media integration, Notifications
Linux Kernel = Android's core operating system, provides services to applications
keyPoints: Ecosystem is the set of components that interact with each other in an Android system
Android versions have increased over the years, with new features and improvements
Android Activity is a component that handles user input and updates the user interface
Android has a wide range of features that enhance the user experience
The Android Architecture Stack provides a framework for building scalable and maintainable applications
The Linux Kernel is the core operating system of Android, providing services to applications and managing system resources
